ticket.subject: Weight Change
ticket.description:
Hello,

 

This is for the Shopify Website: https://karanandassociates.com/ (karanandassociates.myshopify.com).

 

The product weights doen’t seem to automatically update if I edit the product on the Shopify side. However, it doesn’t allow me to edit the weight in PluginHive either.

 

 

Example: this product should be 256 lbs, but only shows 220 lbs

 

 

Kind Regards, Diego

310-916-7516

https://dew.la/

comments.body:
Hello Diego,

Thank you for reaching out to us!

Regarding your query, when the weight of the product is updated in the Shopify, the product weight is updated in the app. It is not possible to update the weight of the product in the app. However, the product which is not added, I could observe that even force importing it is not updated in the app.

I would like to have the collaborator access to your store to check this case from our end. You would have received an email from Shopify to web@karanandassociates.com requesting the same.

Please approve and confirm.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Diego,
 
Thank you for reaching out to us!
 
Regarding your query, when the weight of the product is updated in the Shopify, the product weight is updated in the app. It is not possible to update the weight of the product in the app. However, the product which is not added, I could observe that even force importing it is not updated in the app.
 
I would like to have the collaborator access to your store to check this case from our end. You would have received an email from Shopify to web@karanandassociates.com requesting the same.
 
Please approve and confirm.
 
Regards,
 
Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3:
https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1776665837280239

The customer reports a discrepancy in product weight between Shopify and the app for the product “Industrial Gas Cylinder Storage Rack – 10 Cylinder (5x2) 10 / Up to 12" / Floor Mount”.

- Weight in Shopify: 256 lbs
- Weight in app: 220 lbs
Checks already performed:

- Forced product import
- Updated product import date
However, the weight is still not updating in the app.
Could you please investigate this and advise?

Store URL: karanandassociates.myshopify.com
AC ID: b6bf4e03-d0f3-4eab-ba11-0b84a9c38901
Plan:  $9
